evals.prompt: Design 50 de novo mini-binders against the SARS-CoV-2 RBD (use the target registry entry) at the ACE2-contact epitope. Generate backbones, design 8 sequences each, co-fold the shortlist against the target, and rank by interface confidence. Save a run manifest and a ranked CSV.
evals.expected_output: An orchestration that composes the rfdiffusion-nim, proteinmpnn-nim, and boltz2-nim/openfold3-nim skills in order, remaps epitope residues, writes a run manifest via scripts/manifest.py, applies the ipTM/pLDDT/RMSD filter, and exports a ranked candidates.csv.

assertions.check: Plan invokes the rfdiffusion-nim skill with a binder contig and hotspot_res
Plan invokes the proteinmpnn-nim skill and drops the native/WT row from mfasta
Plan invokes boltz2-nim or openfold3-nim to co-fold the binder with the target and collects ipTM or confidence
Plan uses scripts/manifest.py (Manifest.create, set_scores, apply_filters, to_csv)
Plan filters on ipTM >= 0.8, binder pLDDT >= 80, self-consistency RMSD <= 2.0
Plan remaps epitope author numbering using scripts/pdb_utils.py before use

evals.prompt: For my binder campaign against PD-L1, include proper controls and tell me the success rate.
evals.expected_output: Adds scrambled-sequence negative controls and published-binder positive controls through the same co-folding pipeline, marks them is_control in the manifest, and reports success rate as n_passed / n_candidates.

assertions.check: Plan uses scripts/controls.py to scramble binder sequences and marks them is_control with control_type scrambled

assertions.description: Uses published binders as positive controls
assertions.check: Plan re-scores published binders from the registry through the same pipeline as positive controls
Plan reports success rate as n_passed divided by n_candidates from manifest.summary()
Controls are co-folded and scored with the same settings as the designs

evals.prompt: Continue my interrupted binder run in runs/rbd_binders and only process candidates that are missing scores.
evals.expected_output: Loads the existing manifest with Manifest.load, identifies candidates lacking the needed scores/artifacts, and resumes without re-running completed stages.

assertions.check: Plan calls Manifest.load on the run directory
Plan only processes candidates missing required scores or artifacts
Plan avoids re-running stages already recorded in the manifest
